display.name: Lost Supply Cart
display.short_description: A supply cart has jackknifed into the ditch, its last dry goods pinned under a bent iron rail and a wheel that still creaks in the mud.

choices.label: Pull free the ration crate
choices.summary: Wrench one dry biscuit loose before the frame sinks another inch into the ditch.

choices.label: Pry out the resin tin
choices.summary: Dig a cracked repair tin out from under the axle and keep it for the next broken edge.
